rankings.reason: Highly creative and futuristic, perfectly aligning with the 2050 vision through personalized, high-tech robotic assistance.
Practical and user-centric, focusing on solving immediate traveler pain points with innovative, efficient service integration.
Too generic and focused on current industry standards rather than the requested futuristic, innovative 2050 experience.
Lacks specific technological innovation, offering only vague improvements to existing airport processes and amenities.
